name: HowLongToBeat
description: HowLongToBeat is a game completion time database that tracks how long it takes to finish thousands of video games. Community-sourced data provides average completion times across multiple play styles.
notes: HowLongToBeat does not publish an official blog RSS feed. The site is owned by IGN Entertainment (Ziff Davis). Community discussion occurs on Reddit and social media. No machine-readable blog feed was found during discovery.
